startSection.title: Manage your tasks easily with
startSection.name: Rivere
startSection.description: Rivere is a tool for organizing projects, tasks, and teamwork. Everything in one place, without unnecessary complexity.

firstCard.title: Start right now
firstCard.description: Start organizing your tasks and projects today.

secondCard.title: Invite members to your team
secondCard.description: Work together on tasks and projects.

thirdCard.title: Track your statistics
thirdCard.description: Monitor your productivity and achieve new heights.

fourthCard.title: Communicate with colleagues
fourthCard.description: Discuss tasks and projects in a convenient chat.

firstStep.title: Create an account
firstStep.description: Register your account to start using Rivere.

secondStep.title: Create your first board
secondStep.description: Add a board to start organizing your tasks and projects.

thirdStep.title: Plan
thirdStep.description: After creating a board, you can add cards, set deadlines and priorities, and track progress.

fourthSection.title: Ready to get started?
fourthSection.description: Create account and start managing tasks today.

wrapper.heading: Rivere
wrapper.description: A daily step toward total focus. Rivere helps you organize your daily routine in a convenient Kanban board.
wrapper.loginDescription: Sign in to your account to continue.

verifyEmail.heading: Verify email

verifyEmail.span: Didn't find the email? Check your 'Spam' folder.

account.logout: You have successfully logged out of your account.

first.heading: 1. General Provisions
first.description: This website is a task and project management service. By using this website, the user agrees to this personal data processing policy.

third.heading: 3. Purposes of data processing
third.fourthData: Improving the quality of the service

fourth.heading: 4. Cookies and authorization
fourth.description: The site uses cookies to ensure proper operation, including user authorization. Cookies allow you to save user session and ensure secure access to the account.

fifth.heading: 5. Data Storage and Protection
fifth.description: User data is stored on secure servers. Passwords are stored in encrypted form. We take reasonable measures to protect information from unauthorized access.

sixth.heading: 6. Transfer of Data to Third Parties
sixth.description: We do not transfer personal data to third parties, except as required by law.

seventh.heading: 7. User Rights
seventh.thirdData: Revocation of Consent to Data Processing

eighth.heading: 8. Contact Us
eighth.description: For any questions regarding data processing, you can contact us by email:

password.sameAsCurrent: New password is the same as old password

privacy.required: Consent to this policy is required
